positive: Minimalist celestial guardian spirit, sleek and elegant silhouette of a mythical creature composed of swirling nebula dust, stars, and bioluminescent smoke. The creature is dynamically posed, centered on a vibrant, dark cosmic background, emerging from a central source of starlight. Highly detailed cosmic texture, deep purples, electric blues, and gold accents. Suitable for screen printing on apparel. Vector-graphic quality, high contrast, clean lines, symmetrical composition, ethereal glow, cinematic lighting, maximal negative space.
negative: blurry, grainy, noisy, low quality, watermark, text, logo, artifact, deformed, extra limbs, bad anatomy, jpeg artifacts, low contrast, photo, painting, signature
